caption: The video appears to be an introduction or title sequence for a presentation or lecture related to the Software Package Data Exchange (SPDX) standard, as indicated by the prominent "SPDX" logo and text. The screen displays the words "NEXT DAY VIDEO" in large, bold letters, suggesting that this content is part of a series where recordings are made available online the day after they are recorded. Below the main title, there's a subtitle mentioning the "Evolution of the 'Package Facts' proposal," which implies that the video will discuss the development and changes in a specific aspect of software package data management. The presenter is identified as Kate Stewart, with an email address provided for contact. The website "www.nextdayvideo.com" is also shown, indicating where viewers can access the video content. The overall design is simple and professional, aimed at conveying essential information clearly.
